headline: While Nvidia Battles AMD, Qualcomm Quietly Signed the Biggest AI Deal in Its History. With ByteDance
summary: You may want to keep hitting the buy button on Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM), and the last six weeks handed you three more reasons to do it again. headline: Jensen Huang Just Said $40 Trillion. Here Are 5 Physical AI Stocks Wall Street Is Quietly Loading Up On Before the Rest of the Market Catches On
summary: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang has called humanoid robots and labor automation a $40 trillion total addressable market, and on the Animal Spirits podcast, Derek Yan argued physical AI is “potentially bigger” than EVs or smartphones, with Waymo serving as live proof the underlying autonomy stack already works in the wild. headline: QUALCOMM INC (NASDAQ:QCOM): A Sustainable Dividend Payer with Strong Fundamentals

headline: Kinaxis Convenes Global Supply Chain Leaders at Kinexions North America to Advance Agentic AI and Decision Orchestration
summary: OTTAWA, Ontario, May 28, 2026--Kinaxis® (TSX:KXS), a global leader in end-to-end supply chain planning and orchestration, is set to host Kinexions North America kicking off next week from June 1-3 at The Cosmopolitan of Las Vegas.
